title: Departmental Sustainable Development Strategy: Environment and Climate Change Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Departmental Sustainable Development Strategy: Environment and Climate Change Canada
The Departmental Sustainable Development Strategy (DSDS) outlines departmental actions and programming in support of the Federal Sustainable Development Strategy (FSDS) , and focusses on issues related to the department’s core responsibilities. It also demonstrates our support of the United Nations’ 2030 Sustainable Development Agenda. A new DSDS is tabled one year after the tabling of each new FSDS. DSDS progress reports also inform Canadians of strides made in meeting our commitments.
- Departmental Sustainable Development Strategy, 2023 to 2027 2024-25 Progress report 2023-24 Progress report
- 2024-25 Progress report
- 2023-24 Progress report
- Departmental Sustainable Development Strategy, 2020 to 2023 2021-22 Progress report 2020-21 Progress report
- 2021-22 Progress report
- 2020-21 Progress report
